case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. CAROL J URBAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210005579) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT URBAN, CAROL J AN INDIVIDUAL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-30-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-20-2023 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. *** CASE IS DISMISSED. *** JAMES MCELORY, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE MATTER FOR 180 DAYS IS DENIED. THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S ORAL REQUEST. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
